# Credits {.unnumbered}

## Cover

TODO: add source and licence of the cover image here once
chosen.

## Portraits

The portraits of foundational figures in reproducible research
and the R ecosystem appear in this book with attribution to
their original sources. Each image is reproduced under the
terms stated; please contact the book author for removal if any
attribution is incorrect.

| Figure            | Where             | Source                                   | Licence          |
| ----------------- | ----------------- | ---------------------------------------- | ---------------- |
| Jenny Bryan       | @sec-git-solo     | TODO                                     | TODO             |
| Ben Marwick       | @sec-rrtools      | TODO                                     | TODO             |
| JJ Allaire        | @sec-quarto       | TODO                                     | TODO             |
| Yihui Xie         | @sec-rmd-workflow | TODO                                     | TODO             |
| Hadley Wickham    | @sec-wrangling    | TODO                                     | TODO             |

## Data sources

- `palmerpenguins::penguins` under CC0.
- Examples drawn from `ADNIMERGE` are subject to the ADNI Data
  Use Agreement and are not redistributed.

## Third-party tools used as examples

- `rrtools` (Marwick), MIT license.
- `renv` (Ushey, Posit), MIT license.
- Quarto (Posit), MIT license.
- In-house tools `zzcollab`, `zztable1`, `zzlongplot`,
  `zzrenvcheck`, `zzgit`, `zztab2fig`: GPL-3.

## Code snippets

Unless otherwise stated, code blocks in this book are released
under the MIT License.
